name: VYCOR MEDICAL INC
summary: Vycor Medical Inc operates two business units in the medical device industry. Vycor Medical designs, develops, and markets the ViewSite Brain Access System (VBAS), a next-generation retraction and access system for neurosurgery with FDA 510(k) clearance and CE Marking. NovaVision provides non-invasive, computer-based rehabilitation therapies for vision disorders caused by stroke or brain injury, offering VRT and NeuroEyeCoach products. The company holds ISO 13485:2016 and MDSAP certifications and operates with 7 employees.

products.name: ViewSite Brain Access System (VBAS)
products.description: Next-generation retraction and access system for brain and spine neurosurgery with FDA 510(k) clearance and CE Marking.

products.name: VRT (Visual Restoration Therapy)
products.description: Non-invasive computer-based vision rehabilitation therapy for stroke or brain injury patients, FDA 510(k) cleared as Class U.

products.name: NeuroEyeCoach
products.description: Non-invasive vision rehabilitation product registered as an exempt Class 1 device and CE marked as Class I in Europe.

partnerships.description: Engaged in August 2024 to assist in accelerating company growth through strategic acquisitions and partnerships.
German partner maintains novavision.de website and supports distribution in Germany.
